description_long: This is a low-top sneaker with a sleek black upper and a thick, white rubber sole. The upper appears to be made of synthetic leather or coated fabric, featuring visible stitching along the sides and around the heel for added durability and style. The shoe has a standard lace-up closure with black laces threaded through metal eyelets, and a lightly padded collar for comfort. The interior lining is a light beige or off-white color, suggesting a soft textile material for added comfort. The overall silhouette is modern and minimalistic, suitable for casual urban wear. There are no visible logos or brand markings on the exterior surfaces.
description: A black low-top sneaker with a thick white sole, black laces, and visible stitching, designed for casual urban use.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe, black laces, and the thick white sole with visible stitching on the upper.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the smooth black upper, white stitching, and the full profile of the thick white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel counter, central seam, and the contrast between the black upper and white sole.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the black upper, stitching, and the white sole's profile.
